title: Data Engineer (Microsoft Fabric + Azure)
full_description:
Design and develop ETL/ELT data pipelines using Microsoft Fabric and PySpark. 
 Build and optimize data models to support Power BI dashboards. 
 Write and optimize complex SQL queries for performance and data quality. 
 Ensure data governance and performance standards across Azure-based platforms. 
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver data-driven insights.

title: OpenShift Platform Engineer
full_description: Produce and maintain clear technical documentation and operational runbooks. Qualification: Proven experience managing OpenShift on x86-based infrastructure & container technologies. Strong focus on incident management, root cause analysis, and recovery. Experience working with VMware vSphere / virtualised infrastructure environments. Strong troubleshooting skills across: Networking Storage Container orchestration Platform performance Demonstrable experience in production operations & support environments Experience supporting internal application teams consuming platform services. Ability to work under pressure in critical service environments. Experience with automation tools (e.g., Ansible, Terraform, scripting). Domain Experience Proven experience working within financial services or similarly regulated environments.
